title: Third-Party Actions, Pinning, Dependency Trust, and Workflow CodeQL · Pipeline Repair Bay
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective action dependency and update policy; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in third-party actions, pinning, dependency trust, and workflow codeql, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in action dependency and update policy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Review action publisher, source, bundled code, runtime, inputs, outputs, token access, network behavior, post steps, advisories, and maintenance.
Pin third-party actions to reviewed full commit SHAs, retain readable version comments, and automate reviewed update proposals.
Inventory direct, reusable, composite, Docker, and nested action dependencies plus their effective privilege and provenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Actions Codeql Policy Enforcement
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-actions-codeql-policy-enforcement-tqsizx". Tailor its action-dependency-policy.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Actions Codeql Policy Enforcement.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Actions Codeql Policy Enforcement into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Actions Codeql Policy Enforcement, keep Ci Actions Codeql Policy Enforcement connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-actions-codeql-policy-enforcement-tqsizx
  - competency: ci-actions-codeql-policy-enforcement
    artifact: action-dependency-policy.yaml
    decision: actions codeql policy enforcement
    environment: incident replay using redacted run metadata and immutable artifacts
    fault-injection: rotate a cloud trust condition during deployment
    retained-proof: event ref SHA workflow ref workflow SHA run ID and attempt
    case-key: tqsizx
    change: |
      allowed-actions: reviewed-publishers
      third-party-pin: full-commit-sha
      version-comment: retained
      nested-inventory: generated
      effective-permissions: reviewed
      workflow-codeowners: delivery-security
      update: automated-pr-with-compat-tests
      analysis: codeql-actions-and-policy
      revocation: rehearsed
    verify: enumerate nested actions resolve immutable SHAs inspect bundled runtime inputs post steps permissions advisories and update evidence
    failure: Reject marketplace trust, mutable major tags, top-level-only inventory, general review assumptions, or static analysis as complete proof.
    repair: Review effective code and authority, pin immutable revisions, protect workflow changes, test updates, enforce policy, and rehearse removal.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
